1.content: Which character shall we start with?
1.title: Select A Character

11.content:
Which of the younger kids do we focus on?

Ryan McHiggins, age 2.5. The son of Walter and Wendy, and a smart and kind but cowardly toddler. His fears include bullies, thunder and lightning, and the rabbit who sells batteries on television. Nonetheless, if one of his friends is being bullied, he will put aside his cowardice long enough to save them. His goals in life are to be a brave hero and to be toilet-trained before his third birthday. Ryan takes after his father, Walter, in both looks and personality.

Brad Hunter, age 2.5. The son of Stephen and Ashley, and an adventurous toddler who is Ryan's best friend. Brad is a lot more adventurous than Ryan is, and often tries to talk him into going on dangerous adventures. He does care a lot about Ryan, though, and is often quick to defend him if someone is trying to hurt him physically or emotionally. Brad's interests include sports, video games, and sports-themed video games. Brad takes after his father, Stephen, in personality, but his mother, Ashley, in looks.

Alice Finklemeyer, age 2.5. The daughter of Hector and Helen. Alice is beautiful as she is kind. Her favorite toy is Orville, a teddy bear she got from the mall in her old home on her second birthday. When she first moved in next to the McHiggins' house, she won the hearts of Ryan and Brad with her beauty, but the three settled on being just really good friends with each other for the time being. Ryan and Brad are extremely loyal to Alice, and will protect her from Butch at any costs. Alice is afraid of spiders, and will freak out if one gets near her.
11.title: One of the Younger Kids

"Mike, I gotta go potty. Could you please take me to the bathroom?" Ryan asked Mike.

"You need help with your diaper?" Mike asked Ryan.

"Yes, please." said Ryan.

"Okay, I'll help you. Just hold still." Mike told Ryan. Ryan pulled up his shirt and held still as Mike taped his diaper back onto his bottom.

"There you go, good as new." said Mike. Ryan felt happy that his diaper was still dry and didn't need to be changed. Mike then flushed the urinals and took Ryan over to the sink so they could wash their hands. Once they finished, they went back outside to the sandbox.

111523.content:
Wendy decided to take Ryan to Farl E. Ferret's for the day. Farl E. Ferret's was a children's restaurant and arcade. Ryan liked going to Farl E. Ferret's because he liked playing in the ball pit. However, the last time he went there, something embarrassing happened to him; his diaper came off in the ball pit, leaving him naked from the waist down. The other children there laughed and pointed at Ryan as he pulled his shirt down over his groin and blushed in embarrassment. Ryan told Mike about that experience, and Mike gave him a pair of red baby suspenders to attach to the waistband of his diaper so that it wouldn't happen again.

"Ryan, are you ready to go to Farl E.'s?" Wendy asked Ryan.

"Almost, Mommy. Can I wear my suspenders?" Ryan asked Wendy.

"What for?" Wendy asked Ryan.

"I don't want to lose my diaper in the ball pit again." Ryan told Wendy.

"What a great idea." said Wendy, and she got Ryan's baby suspenders.

"Okay, Ryan. Hold still." said Wendy. Ryan held still as Wendy attached the baby supenders to the waistband of his diaper.

"There. Now even if your diaper comes undone, it won't fall off." Wendy told Ryan.

"Thank you, Mommy." said Ryan. Wendy took Ryan to her car and secured him in his car seat. A few minutes later, the two arrived at Farl E. Ferret's. After they had a lunch of pizza, Wendy took Ryan to the ball pit to play.

"Mrs. Finklemeyer, did Melanie go potty?" Ryan asked Helen.

"She sure did." Helen said as she untaped Melanie's wet diaper, slipped it off, and disposed of it in Alice's diaper pail.

"Mommy, why didn't Melanie go potty in the potty like a big girl?" Alice asked Helen.

"Melanie's not ready to be potty-trained yet. She's too young to take herself to the potty, so she goes potty in her diaper. When you were her age, you did the same thing." Helen explained to Alice as she wiped Melanie's bottom clean and powdered it.

"I'm glad I use the potty now so that you don't have to change me. In fact, I used it earlier today." Alice told Helen.

"Good girl, Alice. You just keep using your potty when you have to go and soon you won't have to wear diapers anymore." Helen told Alice as she taped a clean diaper on Melanie's bottom.

"There you go, Mel. All better." Helen said to Melanie, who giggled happily.

* Jillian - The brawn. She's the eldest sister, being three minutes older than Jane and six minutes older than Janet. She's the meanest of the sisters, as he is constantly in a bad mood. Wendy was cooking pancakes for herself and Ryan for breakfast. Wendy had seated Ryan in his booster seat and tied a bib around his neck. As Wendy was having her coffee, the unimaginable had happened. She lost her grip on the mug's handle and dropped the mug. It fell on the floor and shattered to pieces. Both Ryan and Wendy gasped when they saw this.

"Ryan, don't move, stay right were you are!" said Wendy.

"Why, Mommy?" Ryan asked Wendy.

"There are sharp pieces on the floor and Mommy doesn't want you to get hurt. Stay where you are until Mommy gets this all cleaned up." Wendy told Ryan, noticing that he didn't have his shoes on yet. He only had his socks on. Ryan was frightened, but he did as he was told, because he didn't want things to be even more scary than they were already. Wendy got out a broom and dustpan and began sweeping up the pieces of the broken mug.

132121112.content:
Wendy got most of the pieces, but there was one she missed, and it was under Ryan's chair. She disposed of the pieces she got in the kitchen trash can, then she went back to Ryan.

"Mommy, that was scary." Ryan told Wendy.

"Mommy understands. She was afraid, too."

"Really?" Ryan asked Wendy.

"Yes. Mommy loves you very much and she doesn't want you to get hurt. Are you okay now?" Wendy asked Ryan.

"Yes, Mommy. Can I get down now?" Ryan asked Wendy, who saw that Ryan was still wearing just his socks.

"Not yet. Mommy will be right back." Wendy told Ryan. She looked under his chair and saw a piece she missed under it. Ryan stayed in his booster seat as Wendy swept up the last piece and disposed of it. Wendy then left, and came back with Ryan's shoes. She put them on his feet and tied the laces up.

"There you go. Now it's safe to walk across the floor again." Wendy told Ryan. She took him out of his booster seat and set him down on the floor.

13213.title: Taking Care of Ryan

132132.content:
Wendy and Walter were in the process of potty-training Ryan, but as he still had the occasional "accident", every so often, Wendy would check his diaper to see if he needed to be changed. This was one of those times.

"Okay, Ryan. Time for your potty check." Wendy said as she checked Ryan's diaper.

Was Ryan's diaper clean, or did it need to be changed?
132132.title: Check His Diaper

1321321.content:
To Wendy's relief, Ryan's diaper was still clean. This meant that he was making progress on potty-training.

"Good boy, Ryan. You're still clean. Now, you just let Mommy know if you have to go potty, okay?" Wendy asked Ryan.

"Okay, Mommy." said Ryan.

"What a big boy." Wendy said to Ryan as she pet his head.

What happens next?
1321321.title: Clean

132133.content: What did Wendy play with Ryan?
132133.title: Play With Him

132135.content: Did she put him down for a nap?
132135.title: Something Else

choices: Feed Him a Sippy Cup of Warm Milk
1321351.content: What did Wendy do to help Ryan fall asleep?
1321351.title: Yes

13213511.content:
Wendy sang Ryan a lullaby to help him fall asleep. She sang,

"Hush, little Ryan, don't you cry,
Mommy's gonna sing you a lullaby,
Just rest your little sleepy head,
and take a nice nap in your big boy bed."

Before long, Ryan fell asleep. Wendy carried him to his bedroom, lay him down in his big boy bed, and tucked him in.

"Sweet dreams, Ry-ry." said Wendy. She left to let him sleep. Now that Ryan was asleep, Wendy could do whatever she wanted as long as it didn't wake him up.

Who do we focus on?
13213511.title: Sing a Lullaby

132135112.content: As Ryan slept in his big boy bed, what was he dreaming about?
132135112.title: Ryan Dreaming

135112.content:
Being a teacher, Mallory was able to help Mike with his homework.

What subject was Mallory helping Mike with?

choices: Anything else that might have distracted her.

choices: She Lost Her Favorite Teddy Bear
13511211.title: Yup.

135112111.content: Did Mike offer to feed her?
135112111.title: She Was Hungry

1351121111.content:
Mike volunteered to help Mallory feed Melanie. Mallory sat Melanie down in her high chair and tied a bib around her neck.

What baby food did Mike try to feed Melanie?
1351121111.title: Yeah.

13511211111.content: Would Melanie eat it, though?
13511211111.title: Applesauce

135112111111.content:
It was rather fortunate for Mike that Melanie liked applesauce. In fact, she couldn't get enough of it. Both Mike and Mallory were impressed that Melanie ate every bite of applesauce. When she was finished eating, Mallory removed Melanie's bib and set Melanie down in the living room to play with her toys. Now that Melanie was fed, Mike and Mallory could get back to Mike's math homework.

What happens next?
135112111111.title: Yeah.

choices: Something else he wanted tos ee if he could help her with.
1351121111115.content: Thanks to Mallory, Mike was soon done with his homework. Later, did he offer to help her get Melanie ready for bed?
1351121111115.title: Reader's Choice 5

choices: Feed Her a Bottle of Warm Milk
13511211111151.content: What does Mike do to help Melanie fall asleep?
13511211111151.title: Sure.

135112111111514.content: Does Melanie manage to drink it all?
135112111111514.title: Feed Her a Bottle of Warm Milk

1351121111115141.content:
Melanie was especially hungry that day, so she drank all her milk and soon fell asleep. Mike gently placed her into her crib and tucked her in.

"Sweet dreams, Mel." said Mike. Now that Melanie was asleep, he and Mallory could finish his homework, hopefully without any more interruptions.

What happens next?
1351121111115141.title: Yeah.

info.brief_description: A series of interactive stories based on Toddlerhood, a series by FDMG Productions.
info.description:
A series of interactive stoies based on Toddlerhood, a future animated series by FDMG Productions.

Rules:

1. No vore, gore or deaths.
2. Diaper changes are allowed.
3. No age progression/Age regression.
4. Please keep each chapter E-rated. Offensive language should be limited to implications, and sexual content is strictly prohibited.
5. Keep it realistic. Unrealistic situations should be limited to imagine spots and dream sequences.
6. Nudity should be limited to bathtime and potty-training.
7. Enjoy and have fun!
